essence: Operates heavy machinery that shapes land, moves materials, and powers major construction and civil engineering projects.

identity.title: Plant Operator
identity.summary: Operates heavy construction machinery such as excavators, dumpers, rollers, telehandlers, and loaders to support earthworks, groundwork, and infrastructure projects.

salary.notes: Operators with multiple machine tickets or working on large civils/infrastructure projects can exceed £55k-£65k+.

qualifications: CPCS or NPORS plant operation tickets
Knowledge of machine controls, safety systems, and maintenance
Understanding of site plans, levels, and communication signals
Strong spatial awareness and safety discipline

lifestyle.description: Plant operators work on construction and civil engineering sites using heavy machinery to move earth, dig trenches, lift materials, compact ground, and support major structural works. Days involve machine checks, safe operation, teamwork with groundworkers and supervisors, and adapting to changing site conditions. The role suits individuals who enjoy machinery, outdoor work, and being central to the progress of large projects.

habits: Keeps work areas tidy and hazard‑free
Follows strict site and machine protocols
